# hermes-vendor/ — DO NOT EDIT

**Frozen copy of Hermes 0.15.2 — DO NOT EDIT. Regenerate only via a deliberate, audited version bump.**

This directory holds a frozen source copy (and wheel) of `hermes-agent==0.15.2` for
disaster recovery and the certified bank build. Normal installs use the pin in
`supracloud-jarvis/ira/requirements.txt`; this vendored copy is the fallback if
upstream ever disappears or changes license. The frozen artifacts are populated and
checksummed at the Phase 6 freeze (see MERGE_PLAN.md). Never edit anything here.
